textByHash.191312e2125c128c3bc1e74c493c8a50be0bb494: Hey! Get your hands off there!
textByHash.465d46e3db064dc5c992c0c8a7f6038418cf3263: And he sent a citizen to inform us? Go away!
textByHash.50a13b4714b31facbf6c989af7cfbe087c914865: Welcome back ! Have you seen the furs I have today?
textByHash.5277bc8583d639286aa5f4cabd3f4ca1e0bca62c: His new castle market? So he's taxing us to help him set up a competing market? This is outrageous!
textByHash.706daedf824f3ebc9a75075158551ec3588c7858: Would you like to trade in fur?
textByHash.a463f3cd05a180afb253b23f17bd910d1b69da76: And he sent a mourner to inform us? Go away!
textByHash.bb8a164a3321aa6f8a12fe948ec2e940b594a61a: You're the one who stole something from me!
